title: 加沙與美國印第安保留地比較
meta_description: 加沙與美國印第安保留地比較 - 美國不少州有印第安保留地,不受州政府管轄。例如保留地可以開賭場即使州不能。印第安人被強制遷入。  當年印第安人與白人戰爭，殺白人和敵對部落都是割去頭皮計數戰果。 新疆暴恐,和漢人大量遷入混居，維族人口增長有關。   An American Indian r...
meta_keywords: 加沙,與美,印第安,保留地,比較
contents:
美國不少州有印第安保留地,不受州政府管轄。例如保留地可以開賭場即使州不能。印第安人被強制遷入。

當年印第安人與白人戰爭，殺白人和敵對部落都是割去頭皮計數戰果。
新疆暴恐,和漢人大量遷入混居，維族人口增長有關。


An American Indian reservation is an area of land held and governed by a U.S. federal government-recognized Native American tribal nation, whose government is semi-sovereign, subject to regulations passed by the United States Congress and administered by the United States Bureau of Indian Affairs, and not to the U.S. state government in which it is located

Europeans often removed native peoples from their Indigenous lands. The means varied, including treaties made under considerable duress, forceful ejection, violence, and in a few cases voluntary moves based on mutual agreement. The removal caused many problems such as tribes losing the means of livelihood by being restricted to a defined area, poor quality of land for agriculture, and hostility between tribes.[15]
